final:
module top_module (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	output reg [9:0] ring);always @(posedge clk) begin
		if (reset)
			ring <= 10'b0000000001;
		else
			ring <= {ring[8:0], ring[9]};
	end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (reset) begin
        ring <= 10'b1111111110;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
